paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And it came to pass, when men began to multiply on the face of the ground, and daughters were born unto them,

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: that the sons of God saw the daughters of men that they were fair; and they took them wives of all that they chose.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And Jehovah said, My spirit shall not strive with man for ever, for that he also is flesh: yet shall his days be a hundred and twenty years.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: The Nephilim were in the earth in those days, and also after that, when the sons of God came unto the daughters of men, and they bare children to them: the same were the mighty men that were of old, the men of renown.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And Jehovah saw that the wickedness of man was great in the earth, and that every imagination of the thoughts of his heart was only evil continually.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And it repented Jehovah that he had made man on the earth, and it grieved him at his heart.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And Jehovah said, I will destroy man whom I have created from the face of the ground; both man, and beast, and creeping things, and birds of the heavens; for it repenteth me that I have made them.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: But Noah found favor in the eyes of Jehovah.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: These are the generations of Noah. Noah was a righteous man, [and] perfect in his generations: Noah walked with God.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And Noah begat three sons, Shem, Ham, and Japheth.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And the earth was corrupt before God, and the earth was filled with violence.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And God saw the earth, and, behold, it was corrupt; for all flesh had corrupted their way upon the earth.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And God said unto Noah, The end of all flesh is come before me; for the earth is filled with violence through them; and, behold, I will destroy them with the earth.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Make thee an ark of gopher wood; rooms shalt thou make in the ark, and shalt pitch it within and without with pitch.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And this is how thou shalt make it: the length of the ark three hundred cubits, the breadth of it fifty cubits, and the height of it thirty cubits.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: A light shalt thou make to the ark, and to a cubit shalt thou finish it upward; and the door of the ark shalt thou set in the side thereof; with lower, second, and third stories shalt thou make it.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And I, behold, I do bring the flood of waters upon this earth, to destroy all flesh, wherein is the breath of life, from under heaven; everything that is in the earth shall die.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: But I will establish my covenant with thee; and thou shalt come into the ark, thou, and thy sons, and thy wife, and thy sons` wives with thee.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And of every living thing of all flesh, two of every sort shalt thou bring into the ark, to keep them alive with thee; they shall be male and female.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Of the birds after their kind, and of the cattle after their kind, of every creeping thing of the ground after its kind, two of every sort shall come unto thee, to keep them alive.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And take thou unto thee of all food that is eaten, and gather it to thee; and it shall be for food for thee, and for them.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Thus did Noah; according to all that God commanded him, so did he.
